---
title: "John Henry Scott, 3rd Earl of Clonmell"
---

## John Henry Scott, 3rd Earl of Clonmell

**Dates:** (1817-1866)

### Biography

He was present at the wedding of Jane Colborne to Alexander Montgomery Moore because his wife\'s sister was married to Jane\'s brother.  
He married (1838) the Hon. Anne de Burgh (1818-1872), daughter of Ulysses de Burgh, 2nd Lord Downes of Aghanville.

### Letters

- Letter from October 1, 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
